agent_output: {"escalations":[{"type":"missing_input","description":"Bird has not submitted domain analysis for the invoice generation feature. Without Bird's domain rules, acceptance criteria, and domain term definitions, I cannot produce a complete or safe handoff brief for Shaq. Shipping MJ's architecture alone risks Shaq implementing technically correct code that violates business rules (e.g., tax calculation rules, invoice numbering schemes, required legal fields, rounding policies, currency handling, cancellation/credit note rules). Invoice generation touches money, legal compliance, and customer-facing documents. This is the worst possible feature to ship without domain rules.
